active.name: Gardens by the Bay — Bay South
active.title: Cycling diversion — Bay South
active.note: No cycling on the waterfront promenade facing Marina Reservoir, for the Bay South–Bay East bridge works. The cycling detour goes around the Bay South perimeter — follow on-site signage.

source: Gardens by the Bay notice; affected stretch = Southern Ridges Loop (loop 3) through Gardens by the Bay, from pcn.lines.geojson
